summary: Tested Adaptive Learning and Games Creator bug fixes. Fixed critical backend bug where public game endpoint was using wrong collection. All features now working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /api/play-game/{game_id} endpoint was using db.games instead of db.educational_games - games were not found
FIXED: Adaptive Learning path generation prompt now includes correct_answer field for practice questions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Adaptive Learning and Games Creator features tested and working. Public endpoints for student access are functional.

adaptive_learning.page_loads: PASS - Adaptive Learning page loads with student/subject selectors
adaptive_learning.generate_path_button: PASS - Generate Path button visible and functional
adaptive_learning.practice_questions: PASS - Questions now include correct_answer for selection highlighting
adaptive_learning.listen_button: PASS - Uses browser speechSynthesis API (works offline)

games_creator.page_loads: PASS - Games Creator page loads with all 8 game types visible
games_creator.all_game_types_visible: PASS - Quiz, Matching, Fill-Blanks, True/False, Flashcards, Word Search, Crossword, Drag-Drop
games_creator.word_search_generation: PASS - Generates word search with letter grid
games_creator.crossword_generation: PASS - Generates crossword with clues and input fields
games_creator.drag_drop_generation: PASS - Generates drag-drop with reorderable items
games_creator.game_save: PASS - Games can be saved to library
games_creator.share_link: PASS - Get Student Link button generates shareable URLs

public_endpoints.student_learning_valid: PASS - Returns learning path data for valid token
public_endpoints.play_game_invalid: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid game ID
public_endpoints.play_game_valid: PASS - Returns game data for valid game ID

public_pages.student_learning_page: PASS - Shows 'Enlace no válido' for invalid tokens
public_pages.play_game_page: PASS - Shows 'Juego no encontrado' for invalid game IDs

public_game_endpoint.issue: GET /api/play-game/{game_id} was using db.games instead of db.educational_games

adaptive_learning_questions.issue: AI prompt for learning path generation did not include correct_answer field in question format
adaptive_learning_questions.fix: Added correct_answer field to JSON schema and IMPORTANT note to AI prompt

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/student-learning/{token} - public endpoint for student access
GET /api/play-game/{game_id} - public endpoint for game access

games_creator_page: My Games tab with saved games
